title: Iran-US/Israel conflict: Indian government's gas supply order bars filing of cases over diverted LNG supplies
description: The Central government’s Natural Gas (Supply Regulation) Order issued on March 9 under the Essential Commodities Act, 1955 contains a clause barring entities that receive diverted natural gas supplies from filing court cases against the revised supply arrangement.The order allows the government to reallocate natural gas to priority sectors such as households, transport fuel and fertiliser production. Since these diversions may alter supply volumes or pricing under existing gas sale agreements (G
